response.justification: Despite exceptional technical qualifications and 15+ years of software development experience, Bogdan is severely overqualified for an entry-level position—a significant retention risk who would outgrow this role within months. More critically, his German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' failing to meet the required 'strong verbal and written communication in German' for client collaboration in the insurance sector. His career trajectory from staff/senior roles, combined with an unexplained seven-month career gap, suggests motivational misalignment with a junior developer track.
strengths: Deep expertise in agile methodologies, TDD, and software craftsmanship principles across numerous organizations
Proven ability to rapidly learn new technologies and domains while maintaining high code quality standards
Strong communication and mentoring background demonstrated through conference talks, workshops, and open-source project leadership
concerns: Dramatically overqualified with career history of senior and staff-level positions—high flight risk for an entry-level role
German language proficiency marked as 'Basic,' not meeting the required fluency for direct client collaboration in German-speaking insurance projects
Unexplained seven-month career gap (October 2025–May 2026) following staff-level position raises questions about motivation and fit for junior-level work
